Objective to study the nursing points of using semiconductor laser to cure early glottis cancer.
In hiccupping, we use ancient muscles to quickly close the glottis while sucking in (albeit air, not water).
Just after the muscles start to move, the glottis shuts off the windpipe to produce the characteristic "hic" sound.
